key: SELECT lnkPersonToTeam JOIN Person ON lnkPersonToTeam.person_id = Person.id JOIN Team ON lnkPersonToTeam.team_id = Team.id WHERE Person.name = 'My last name' AND Person.first_name = 'My first name' AND Team.name = 'team service human'
